description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push to master, on pull requests, and on release creation. The workflow has four jobs: build, format, build-docs, and deploy. The build job sets up Python 3.10, installs dependencies, runs tests with pytest, and uploads coverage to Codecov. The format job checks code format with pre-commit. The build-docs job builds documentation with mkdocs. The deploy job depends on the other jobs and deploys to PyPI on release creation.
